goal: Analyze all the issues and tell the solution for them
detected_issue: Slow Response Time and High CPU usage on Kubernetes nodes are causing issues in Customer Support, Recommendation Engine, and API Gateway services.
root_cause: Insufficient monitoring and alerting mechanisms to detect and respond to these issues promptly.
recommended_action: Implement real-time monitoring and alerting systems to detect anomalies and trigger automated responses. Conduct regular performance tuning and capacity planning for Kubernetes nodes.

detected_issue: Delivery issues and Customer support unresponsiveness are affecting business operations.
root_cause: Database connection timeouts and High CPU usage on Kubernetes nodes are causing these issues.
recommended_action: Investigate the root causes, optimize database connections, and monitor CPU usage to prevent further disruptions.

goal: Describe the issue and suggest actions to be taken .
detected_issue: Refund delays and customer support unresponsiveness are causing significant issues.
root_cause: Inefficient ticket resolution process and inadequate staffing in the Customer Support department.
recommended_action: Implement a new ticket prioritization system to ensure timely resolutions, and hire additional staff to reduce wait times.

detected_issue: Failed to parse analysis from LLM.
